prompt: My MCP server filesystem isn't responding in Claude Desktop, can you diagnose it?

assertions.name: profile-gate-first
assertions.description: Profile check happens before any diagnostic steps

assertions.name: references-mcp-doc
assertions.description: Consults the MCP reference file or mentions MCP-specific scripts

assertions.name: checks-config-file
assertions.description: Examines Claude Desktop config JSON location and contents

assertions.name: checks-node-version
assertions.description: Verifies Node.js version is 18+ as a prerequisite

assertions.name: actionable-fixes
assertions.description: Provides specific, actionable fix steps rather than just generic advice
